zh.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilson於1455年3月25日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。他於1485年5月15日與Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德莫藍德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilson was born on 25 March 1455, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. He married Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson on 15 May 1485, in Morland, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilson est né le 25 mars 1455, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson le 15 mai 1485, à Morland, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilsonは1455年3月25日にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた。1485年5月15日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドモーランドでLady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilson(은)는 1455년 3월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났다. 그는 1485년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 모를랜드에서 Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Patrick Robert Wilson родился 25 марта 1455 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson 15 мая 1485 г. в местности морланд, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.
